name: Leather mini bag
description:
This gorgeous Hermes Vermillion Swift Leather Jige PM Clutch Bag from 2008 is the most elegant way to organize your essentials like your bills, currency, credit cards and is great for nights out. It features gorgeous Swift leather in a lovely red color with a signature H logo and a gusseted compartment inside. This stunning piece will always be a timeless classic.
The exterior leather is clean with some very light creasing at the base. The corners and edge trim remain clean. The interior leather is clean.
Material: Vermillion (red) Swift leather
Includes: Hermes dust bag
Origin: France
Production Year: 2015
Date/Authenticity Code: T no shape
Measurements: 11.5" L x 1" W x 7"H
Closure/Opening: Flap top with slide through "H"
Interior Lining: Leather lining
